title: micromeria graeca subsp. micrantha
intro: Micromeria graeca subsp. micrantha, also known as Crete thyme, is a subspecies of the Micromeria graeca plant, which is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Micromeria graeca subsp. micrantha include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit antimicrobial activity against certain pathogens. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
